[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011111 5
1 10011110 5
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 10110100 4
6 01100110 4
7 01101010 4

01 10 00100100 2
12 21 01100010 3
23 32 01101010 4 match 7
34 43 10000100 2
45 54 10010001 3
56 65 00011001 3
67 76 00011110 4
70 07 10010100 3

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 01100110 4 match 6
24 42 00000000 a match 2 3 4
35 53 10001000 2
46 64 00010101 3
57 75 10011000 3
60 06 00010100 2
71 17 00000110 2

03 30 10100100 3
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 00001110 3
47 74 10010100 3
50 05 10010000 2
61 16 00000110 2
72 27 00001010 2

04 40 10010100 3
15 51 00000000 a match 2 3 4
26 62 00001010 2
37 73 10001110 4
